subcodes.first_line: The gate of utterance hath been opened wide, and the verses of God, the Lord of lords, have descended. That which was hidden from sight hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فتح باب البیان و نزلت ایات الله رب الارباب قد ظهر ما کان مستورا عن الابصار
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement
